title: Compound Errors
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation leading to market freeze due to interface mismatch

prevention.rule: Block any tx that upgrades the oracle contract if the upgrade introduces interface mismatches with existing contracts.
prevention.trigger: UPGRADE_ORACLE_CONTRACT -> Interface mismatch detected in post-execution analysis

red_flags: Interface mismatch between cETH and new oracle implementation
Revert due to empty bytes returned by getUnderlyingPrice
monitoring_rules: Monitor for interface mismatches during oracle contract upgrades
summary: A bug in Compound's oracle upgrade caused the cETH market to freeze due to interface mismatches. A guard could prevent such issues by blocking oracle contract upgrades that introduce interface mismatches.
